daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today—your mind is sharp and your intuition is louder than usual. Trust that little voice telling you to shake things up. This is your moment to feel genuinely aligned.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, today's about real talk without the heaviness. Single? Someone's noticing your energy. Either way, authenticity is your biggest flex right now. Let people see the real you.
daily.career: Your productivity levels are through the roof today. That project you've been sitting on? Start it. Your creative problem-solving is unmatched rn, and doors are opening for those who show up intentionally.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement—whether that's a walk, yoga, or dancing in your room. Mental clarity follows physical flow. Small habits compound, so start something today that makes you feel alive.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to slow down and actually listen to what your intuition's been trying to tell you. Mercury's moving favorably, so clarity is coming—trust the whispers.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, this is peak energy for authentic connections. Stop performing and let people see the real you. The right ones will stay, and that's the whole point.
weekly.career: Your work momentum is building quietly. Small wins matter more than you think right now. Stay focused on what you can control and watch how opportunities align when you're not forcing things.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for presence over perfection. Move in ways that feel good, nourish yourself without guilt, and create space for rest. Energy follows intention—set yours toward feeling genuinely better.
